subcodes.first_line: Say: O people of the Bayán! Hearken unto My call at the time when the Bird of Oneness winged its flight unto the luminous atmosphere of sanctity and was cut off [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا ملاء البیان اسمعوا ندائی حین الذی قد صعد طیر الاحدیه الی هوآء قدس منیر ثم انقطع
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @nearness and remoteness
